subject: Re: Weather PARIS/Zorro
body:
check out a new gps system now runnung at st thomas. , go to st thomas source for info


----- Original Message ----
From: "lvjet@aol.com" <lvjet@aol.com>
To: kellens@earthlink.net; kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Sent: Thursday, November 9, 2006 12:57:48 PM
Subject: Weather PARIS/Zorro


 WEATHER:
#1 Zorro:
No Rain in forecast for next 7 days;
Friday-Sunny high 68 degrees / low 36
Saturday - Sunny High 56 degrees / low 35
Sunday - Sunny High 54 degrees / 27
Monday - Thursday same.
 
#2 PARIS:
Current conditions / partly cloudy / unresticted visbility / temp. 43 degrees.
Friday - Mostly cloudy skies for afternoon due to LOW pressure moving into area from UK.
Satuday - Rain showers / high 57 degrees / lows 37.
Sunday - Rain / high 49 degrees / low 39
Monday - Thursday:  Rain showers each day
 
***
UNIVERSAL WEATHER SAID THAT SATURDAY MORNING FOG 200 OVERCAST 1/2 MILE VISIBILTY.
TODAY THEY REPORTED 700 OVERCAST 1 MILE TILL 10AM.
